data.speech_home_only: Speech only when someone is home

data_description.personal_assistant: Name used in generated messages when the assistant is mentioned.
data_description.persons_section: Presence configuration used to decide who receives notifications.
data_description.persons: People considered for presence-aware notification routing.
data_description.location_tracker: Fallback entity used to decide if notifications should be sent when no persons are selected.
data_description.text_events_section: Settings for text notifications, persistent notifications and Home Assistant events.
data_description.notify_service_targets: Classic notify services used for normal text notifications.
data_description.notify_entity_targets: Entity-based notify targets used for normal text notifications via notify.send_message.
data_description.ha_event_notify_service_targets: Classic notify services used only for Home Assistant lifecycle events.
data_description.ha_event_notify_entity_targets: Entity-based notify targets used only for Home Assistant lifecycle events via notify.send_message.
data_description.alexa_notifications: Enables or disables Alexa announcements from Notifier Hub.
data_description.alexa_players: Alexa media players that can receive voice announcements.
data_description.google_notifications: Enables or disables Google/Cast announcements from Notifier Hub.
data_description.google_players: Google or Cast media players that can receive voice announcements.
data_description.google_tts_service: TTS service used to generate Google voice announcements.
data_description.google_notify_service: Notify service used for Google Assistant style notifications.
data_description.default_language: Language code used when a message does not specify one.
data_description.default_volume: Default volume used for voice announcements.
data_description.tts_wait_time: Extra wait time added while estimating how long speech playback takes.
data_description.phone_notifications: Enables or disables phone call notifications.
data_description.sip_server_name: SIP server used by the phone call backend.
data_description.screen_notifications: Allows persistent notifications in Home Assistant.
data_description.speech_notifications: Allows voice notifications through Alexa or Google.
data_description.speech_home_only: When enabled, voice messages without an explicit location only play when someone is home.
data_description.ha_event_notifications: Sends notifications for Home Assistant start, stop, restart and related events.
data_description.auto_volume_section: Automatic volume configuration by day period.
data_description.auto_volume: Automatically adjusts TTS volume based on the current day period.
data_description.night_dnd: Automatically enables do not disturb while the current Auto Volume period is Night or Late night.
data_description.auto_volume_exclude_players: Media players that should not be controlled by auto volume.
data_description.install_dashboard: Copies the Notifier Hub dashboard YAML and shows the setup instructions.
